label: Keyframe
description: A single keyframe in a KeyframeAnimationPart. Specifies the node's position offset, rotation angle, scale, and optional graphic state at the given tick.

tick.label: Tick
tick.description: Animation tick at which this keyframe applies.

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: Position offset applied to the node at this keyframe. Default is (0, 0, 0).

angle.label: Angle
angle.description: Rotation angle in degrees applied to the node at this keyframe. Default is 0.

scale.label: Scale
scale.description: Scale multiplier applied to the node at this keyframe. Default is (1, 1, 1).

graphicState.label: Graphic state
graphicState.description: GraphicStateDef to switch the node's graphic to at this keyframe. Optional.
